tasks_completed: Task 1.5: _DOMAIN_TEMPLATES constant added in app/components/wizard.py (3-key pre-#137 form)
Task 1.6: generate_yaml_from_wizard() applies template merge gated on base_profile == template name
Task 1.7: photon_app.py selectbox extended with institutional_docs + repo_id validation via validate_generated_repo_id() helper
summary: Issue #115 wizard JP prompt + institutional_docs domain template implemented in TDD (Red-Green) across 6 files. detect_language() classifies questions into ja/en/other via single-pass codepoint scan. _resolve_system_prompt() helper appends conditional Japanese institutional-doc hint to _SYSTEM only when detect_language returns 'ja'. _DOMAIN_TEMPLATES['institutional_docs'] (pre-#137 3-key form) merged into wizard YAML when base_profile == 'institutional_docs'. validate_generated_repo_id() helper added in app/components/wizard.py (streamlit-free, unit-tested) and called from photon_app.py before persisting. Streamlit selectbox gained 'institutional_docs' option. All 355 baseline_reporag + photon_app_components tests pass; ruff check / format clean. Existing test classes (TestBuildMessages, TestFormatHintFewShot, TestFlattenMessagesForPlainLM, TestBuildMessagesSessionSummary, T-C6 5 tests) untouched.
notes: build_messages() signature is unchanged — pipeline.py:201 and photon_pipeline.py:1005 callsites need no edits.
_FEW_SHOT_EXAMPLES (7 examples) and _FORMAT_HINT (<=6000 chars) preserved; existing test_few_shot_examples_count and test_format_hint_token_budget pass.
ABSTAIN_MARKER ('根拠が不足しています') and [C:N] citation format unchanged.
_JP_INSTITUTIONAL_HINT is module-private; tests use substring assertion ('制度文書を根拠に回答する場合は') per DR1-006 to avoid coupling tests to private constant naming.

_DOMAIN_TEMPLATES is in pre-#137 form (3 keys: multilingual-e5-small / symbol_graph.enabled=false / ms-marco-MiniLM-L-6-v2). Source-of-truth CI guard (test_domain_template_matches_institutional_yaml) parses configs/institutional_docs.yaml directly via yaml.safe_load — independent of pin constants in tests/test_pipeline_factory_yaml_invariants.py per DR2-002.

validate_generated_repo_id() returns Optional[str] error message rather than raising; the caller (Streamlit UI) shows it via st.error() and refuses to save. Helper is streamlit-free so it has 5 unit tests in tests/test_photon_app_components.py.

Streamlit UI changes in photon_app.py (selectbox option + repo_id validation call) are minimal and require manual smoke-test via 'streamlit run app/photon_app.py' to verify wizard flow end-to-end (test pyramid: pure helpers covered by automated tests, streamlit glue covered by manual UAT).
